privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetic data created by setup_task.sh. The customer 'Meridian Pacific Group' is created during setup. Two products are provisioned: Standing Desk Pro - Height Adjustable (15 units @ $649 each) and Executive High-Back Chair (8 units @ $425 each), resulting in an expected total of $13,135. The internal note keyword is 'Priority order' and the payment terms keyword is '30' days. All metadata values are exact matches to the data source code.
